counters.description: skill matchup early. buying early swifties -> bramble makes the early game for this match-up much easier. late game aatrox is pretty much impossible to 1v1 if equal on items.

this champion is very over-tuned, sticky, high damage and just broken. you are strong in team-fights against her if you peel, but 1v1s will be hard at all stages of the game unless you get a lead. use r when she uses her shield, so it times out inside your belly and can be ignored. | start items: - d.shield -> dark seal | tank items: - swifties -> heartsteel | ap items: - swifties -> heartsteel -> riftmaker

pretty rough,  has max hp dmg and crazy move speed. its hard to catch gnar. mega gnar is also strong and can finish you off very easily. try to r towards the end of mega gnar for dmg onto baby gnar. second wind is required.

gwen damage is crazy. max health and true damage is painful. careful of gwens who run ignite they have very large kill windows on you. take phase rush and play for tower cheese or force ult and run away. gwen has no way of cancelling your w so escape over walls can be possible.

completely disgusting borderline unplayable but not many people play heimer. farm with q or under tower. only ever w onto him after landing q for the almost guaranteed hit. take phase rush and eat him away from his turrets. cleanse instead of ghost is an option (untested)

disgusting champ. if you get hit by her e (soul grab) do not fight her, either wait at the edge or leave the area. do not think she wont one shot you because she will. take phase rush, if you land q, use w and phase  rush her under your tower beware she can still one shot you under tower.
very annoying, very broken. his w will do crazy damage to you so avoid it as best you can. do not try and r him while he has w or r or rw (yeah 3 unstoppables fun!).
annoying but not unplayable. kennen can dodge w even after q slow. don't just take poke for free, wait for the wave to push or look for all ins.
disgusting champ who even plays this??? idk, try and dodge the q (it has antiheal inbuilt). save your r for dismount and try and 1 shot him.

very common counterpick, he will always win in his r, do not try and trade, he will e you back and win every trade. beware if you r him and his ult ends he will be cleansed of your ult!!! wait until after the ult to r him if you can, it will do more damage. take phase rush, play for small trades and running, your teamfight should be better.
surprisingly hard, his w does like 25% max health or something, he really hurts. eat him out of his r recast and try and kite out brittle marks.
very strong, can cancel your w with her e and r, and does max health. try to not trade into her passive shield. if the timing is right you can r her as she rs you and she will flying along with you.

strong early against you, play very slow and farm with q is possible. his empowered w will break your e shield so use it frequently instead of one big shield. wait until a couple items and then 1v1 becomes easier.

very strong, max hp damage, true damage and 2 cc  for your w. play slow early until 6. some sett players run ignite. if you r him under tower, try and spit him sideways, as most setts will instantly try and r you out of tower range.
idk why this champion is, and continues to be. just farm, don't try and fight him, be at objectives. if you get bami's cinder you can counter proxy.

mostly comes down to dodging the e. swifties are mandatory to not get slowed by his q and r and to dodge the e. don't trade into his e shield, try and stay on the same side as him to avoid proccing all of his leg cannons (they do max hp damage).
cringe players! hail of blades can be useful for catching them off guard and insta ring them. try to prevent her hitting the 3 hit passive while farming and be ready for when jungle is topside.
very hard, you cannot trade. the only champ in the game you cannot tower cheese. phase rush can still be useful though for running.
my perma-ban. i do not know how to beat this disgusting champ. the best you can do is wave-clear under tower and prevent his split push. 1 bad base and you have lost 3 plates.

synergies.description: classic combo, kindred uses ult and you can eat enemies outside of it's range.
classic combo, kindred uses ult and you can eat enemies outside of it's range.
